differential_diagnoses: Acute viral hepatitis (HAV, HBV, HCV, HEV)
next_steps: Serologic testing for Leptospira (MAT or ELISA) and PCR for Leptospira DNA
Peripheral blood smear review for intraerythrocytic organisms (Babesia)
Hepatitis serology panel (HAV IgM, HBsAg, HBcAb IgM, HCV antibody, HEV IgM/IgG)
Serum ferritin, iron studies, and ceruloplasmin levels
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics (doxycycline, ceftriaxone) and supportive care
Pulmonary consultation for possible bronchoscopy if respiratory status does not improve
